productDisplayName: Senorita Women Green & Silver Colored Sandals
description: Style NoteThe Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name. Subtle, pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!Product DetailsSilver and green sandal with thong style synthetic straps in green and a plastic toe separatorSoft footbed with oval nubs all over the footbedTextured TPU outsole Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
